nasb.text: for they were saying, “Not during the festival, otherwise there might be a riot of the people.”

esv.text: for they said, “Not during the feast, lest there be an uproar from the people.”

cnv.text: 不過他們說：“不可在節期下手，免得引起民眾暴動。”

ccb.text: 他们说：“我们不能在节期那天下手，以免在百姓中引起骚乱。”

csbs.text: 不过他们说：“不可在节日期间，免得民众发生骚乱。”
